title: veronica alpina var. nutans
intro: Veronica alpina var. nutans, also known as the nutant alpine speedwell, is a plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Veronica alpina var. nutans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
